narrative:
Mcarthur Twp township has 1,369 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.9 percentage points.
